mapper.select: SELECT i.inventory_id, i.product_id, i.warehouse_id, i.qty_on_hand, i.qty_reserved, i.lot_no, i.expiry_date, DATE_FORMAT(i.last_updated, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS last_updated, p.product_code, p.product_name, p.unit, p.reorder_point, w.warehouse_code, w.warehouse_name FROM INVENTORY i INNER JOIN PRODUCT p ON i.product_id = p.product_id INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE w ON i.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id WHERE i.inventory_id = #{inventoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INVENTORY (product_id, warehouse_id, qty_on_hand, qty_reserved, lot_no, expiry_date) VALUES (#{productId}, #{warehouseId}, #{qtyOnHand}, 0, #{lotNo}, #{expiryDate}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE qty_on_hand = qty_on_hand + #{qtyOnHand}, last_updated = NOW()
